title: Resonance: Iron Ayah & Astrophysics
content: The Quran says iron was "sent down" — astrophysics confirms iron forms in supernovae and arrives via cosmic impacts
ayah_ref: وَأَنزَلْنَا الْحَدِيدَ فِيهِ بَأْسٌ شَدِيدٌ — الحديد: 25

design.html:
"اقْرَأْ بِاسْمِ رَبِّكَ الَّذِي خَلَقَ"
🌀 IQRA
